chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6769 of 2021 CP D 6770 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 29244/2021 2. For hearing of main case 06.02.2025 Mr. Hyder Ali Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, in these petitions show cause notices have been impugned, however, the petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel further seeks that the notices be determined vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, and subject to the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that these petitions may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
